features.label: Password Strength Checker
features.desc: Entropy bits, charset size, crack time estimate (GPU-speed), 7 requirement checks, common password detection. Live as you type.

features.label: Hash Format Detector
features.desc: Paste any hash → auto-detects MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512, bcrypt, CRC32, NTLM by length and pattern.

features.label: Salted Hash Generator
features.desc: Text + salt (random or manual) → salted hash. 3 output formats: $salt$hash, salt:hash, JSON.

features.label: PBKDF2 Key Derivation
features.desc: Password + salt + iterations + key length → derived key via Web Crypto PBKDF2. Output in hex and Base64.

features.label: Checksum Verifier
features.desc: Drop any file → computes MD5/SHA-1/SHA-256/SHA-512. Paste expected checksum → instantly shows which algorithm matches.

features.label: Multiple Output Formats
features.desc: Hash in 7 formats: hex lowercase, hex uppercase, 0x prefix, colon-separated, Base64, Base64URL, binary.

features.label: Hash Visualization
features.desc: Identicon-style symmetric color grid generated from any hash. Configurable grid size (8x8, 10x10, 12x12). Download as PNG.

features.label: Batch Export (JSON/CSV)
features.desc: Hash multiple strings with multiple algorithms at once. Export as JSON or CSV file.
